title: The Crew Faces a Human Child
description: On pages 6–11, this part focuses on Koala, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the crew faces a human child.
scene: The scene follows the crew faces a human child, keeping the focus on Koala, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few weeks later... the grand line, Foolshout Island

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Koala!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: step out onto the shore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is YOUR Homeland ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which way is your village? I'll take you as far as the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Guehhhhh! Don't go, Koala! Let's all keep sailing together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ohhh, stop crying.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a great Kiiiind!! Even though you're a human!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll tell everyone in the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That lots of fishmen are really nice people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Take care of yourself !!

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Koala!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Squeeze

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the time she grows up, she'll be just like the rest of 'em.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Why, Arlong, you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Dammit, Arlong ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Jinbe... you've changed an awful lot in these past three years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Try thinking about it for a second. What good is it going to do if one girl tells the villagers that fishmen are good people?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just like Otohime's pleas, her words will just fall on empty ears!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is rear Admiral strawberry, of Marine HQ!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We received word from the residents of a certain island ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...that you would be visiting this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people of the village you just left, too, have kindly agreed to our causing a slight disturbance here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In return, that is, for our agreement to overlook their possession of a certain girl who rightfully belongs to the tenryu- Ubito.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As you should be well aware ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...you are guilty of two crimes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: your raid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and your flight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What were those gunshots ...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They came from the direction the boss headed in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey - look over there!! Out at sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the Marines... they have us surrounded!! Chuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This was a trap!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You see ...?! this is how humans work!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone, abandon ship!! Retreat to the sea bottom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AaaA 6!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Boss T1 is in trouble ...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with this guy?! He just won't go down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let your guard down... this is the man who successfully raided Mariejoa all on his own!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where the heck is all this strength coming from?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Boss T!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rear Admiral !!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: It's the Sun Pirates !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...so that is ...

summary: The Crew Faces a Human Child. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
